title: BCI Swing Function v1
description: Schema for BCI swing functions that map physiological or neural features to entertainment metric adjustments within the Horror$Place VM-constellation. Each swing is a named, parameterized transformation with explicit linkage to safety tiers, entitlement profiles, and Dead-Ledger proof types. Serialized as single-line NDJSON within qpudatashard envelopes.

bci_swing_function.description: A self-contained BCI transformation definition for cross-repo orchestration.

function_id.description: Stable identifier for this BCI swing function instance.

input_features.description: List of BCI-derived or physiological features used as input to this transformation.

output_targets.description: Metrics or system parameters adjusted by this swing.

safetytier.description: Governing safety posture; determines allowable input/output ranges and proof requirements.

entitlement_profile_id.description: ID of the Dead-Ledger entitlement or BCIseed profile governing this swing.

prooftype.description: Primary ZKP proof type required to authorize invocation of this swing.

input_bands.description: Expected numeric ranges for each input feature; used for validation and gating.

output_bands.description: Allowed target bands or delta ranges for each output metric.

delta_mode.description: Whether output is an absolute value, relative adjustment, or clamped to bounds.

guardrail_flags.description: Behavioral flags for edge-case handling and safety enforcement.

auto_downgrade.description: If true, automatically reduce intensity_band on overload detection.

hard_block.description: If true, deny swing invocation if any input exceeds safe bounds.

log_only.description: If true, record swing evaluation without applying output (research mode).

require_deadledger_ref.description: If true, swing invocation requires a valid deadledgerref attestation.

max_invocations_per_session.description: Optional cap on how many times this swing may fire per user session.

lab_source.description: Tier-3 lab repository where this swing was calibrated or validated.

version.description: Semantic version of this swing function definition.

calibration_metadata.description: Optional metadata about the calibration dataset or research protocol.
